description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Push Binary Nightly that runs daily at 10:45 AM or on manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_on_cpu and test_on_gpu. The build_on_cpu job runs on a linux.2xlarge host, sets up Conda, installs dependencies, and builds FBGEMM_GPU nightly wheel for Python 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10 with CUDA 11. The test_on_gpu job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host, downloads the wheel from GHA, installs dependencies, tests FBGEMM_GPU installation, and pushes the wheel to PyPI.
